title: Department Manager Vacancy at Lifestyle Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Lifestyle Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Lifestyle Advisory Limited invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Department Manager at our Srinagar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Lifestyle Advisory Limited:
Lifestyle Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lifestyle Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
